reason: Extreme Sentiment Detected (Score: 9/10): Reports of extensive damage at Ras Laffan, one of the world's largest LNG export terminals, signals a massive supply shock that would likely cause an extreme upward price reaction in natural gas markets due to global supply tightening.

payload.summary: Reports of extensive damage at Ras Laffan, one of the world's largest LNG export terminals, signals a massive supply shock that would likely cause an extreme upward price reaction in natural gas markets due to global supply tightening.

reason: Extreme Sentiment Detected (Score: 8/10): The reported strikes on major energy assets by Iran and Israel represent a severe geopolitical escalation that directly impacts global energy security, creating extreme risk-on sentiment and volatility for Natural Gas and other energy commodities.

payload.summary: The reported strikes on major energy assets by Iran and Israel represent a severe geopolitical escalation that directly impacts global energy security, creating extreme risk-on sentiment and volatility for Natural Gas and other energy commodities.

reason: Extreme Sentiment Detected (Score: 9/10): The reports of a strike on the world's top LNG plant leading to a 35% jump in European gas prices represent an extreme supply-side shock and significant geopolitical risk, which would cause massive volatility and panic in global natural gas markets including Henry Hub.

payload.summary: The reports of a strike on the world's top LNG plant leading to a 35% jump in European gas prices represent an extreme supply-side shock and significant geopolitical risk, which would cause massive volatility and panic in global natural gas markets including Henry Hub.
